title: Paella with Grilled Pineapple and Croatian Sausage
description: A twist on the classic Spanish paella dish, featuring grilled pineapple and Croatian sausage.
instructions: Grill pineapple chunks until caramelized, about 5 minutes per side.
In a large paella pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add sliced Croatian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add boneless, skinless chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add uncooked paella rice and stir to combine.
Add grilled pineapple chunks and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer paella over low heat for 20 minutes, or until rice is cooked.
Serve hot, garnished with grilled pineapple chunks.
